description: An energy trader needs to analyze market data to propose a competitive price for a 10-year Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with a corporate off-taker.

nodes.task_description: Fetch the last 24 months of historical wholesale electricity prices for the relevant market node.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves accurate historical price data.

nodes.task_description: Analyze long-term price forecasts and market volatility trends.

expected_outcome.value: Agent summarizes key trends and forecasted price ranges.

nodes.task_description: Calculate a proposed PPA price with a target profit margin, considering price cannibalization and curtailment risks.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a justified PPA price and risk assessment.
